.github/quarkus-ecosystem-test.general_idea: Change the Maven execution directory to 'api' to target the specific module for ecosystem testing.
Adjust the path to the Maven settings file to be relative to the new working directory.
Switch the version property from generic quarkus.version to quarkus.devtools.version to align with the specific module's dependency management.
Explicitly define the Quarkus platform group ID to ensure correct dependency resolution in the new environment.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add node_modules to .gitignore to exclude frontend dependencies.
Add .yarn to .gitignore to exclude Yarn cache/directories.
Add .bit to .gitignore to exclude Bit component cache.
Add target/ to .gitignore to exclude Maven build output.
Remove /node from .gitignore as it is no longer needed or relevant.
Remove specific Maven release plugin backup files from .gitignore.

Makefile.general_idea: Restructure the Makefile to support a multi-module project layout by adding directory-specific targets for api, library, and frontend.
Makefile.human_impl: cd api && mvn compile quarkus:dev

Makefile.general_idea: Rename the backend development target to dev-api to reflect the new module naming convention.
Makefile.human_impl: dev-api: cd api && mvn compile quarkus:dev

Makefile.general_idea: Add a dedicated target to run unit tests for the API module.
Makefile.human_impl: test-api: cd api && mvn clean test -DskipITs

Makefile.general_idea: Add a target to start the API application using the generated JAR.
Makefile.human_impl: start-api: java -jar api/target/quarkus-app/quarkus-run.jar

Makefile.general_idea: Add a target to run integration tests for the API module.
Makefile.human_impl: it-api: cd api && mvn clean verify

Makefile.general_idea: Add a target to build the API module skipping tests.
Makefile.human_impl: build-api: cd api && mvn clean install -DskipTests

Makefile.general_idea: Add a target to build the Docker image for the API module.
Makefile.human_impl: docker-build-api: cd api && docker build -f src/main/docker/Dockerfile.multistage -t quay.io/quarkus/code-quarkus-api .

Makefile.general_idea: Add a target to build the library module.
Makefile.human_impl: build-lib: cd library && yarn && yarn build

Makefile.general_idea: Add a target to run tests for the library module.
Makefile.human_impl: test-lib: cd library && yarn test

Makefile.general_idea: Add a target to tag the library module.
Makefile.human_impl: tag-lib: cd library && yarn run tag

Makefile.general_idea: Add a target to link the library module with the frontend.
Makefile.human_impl: link-lib: cd library && yarn && yarn build && yarn run link; cd frontend && yarn run link-library;

Makefile.general_idea: Add a target to unlink the library module from the frontend.
Makefile.human_impl: unlink-lib: cd frontend && yarn && yarn run unlink-library; cd library && yarn && yarn run unlink;

Makefile.general_idea: Simplify the main dev target to only run the API dev mode, removing the parallel frontend build.
Makefile.human_impl: dev: cd api && mvn quarkus:dev

Makefile.general_idea: Add a target to run tests for the frontend module.
Makefile.human_impl: test-frontend: cd frontend && yarn && yarn test

Makefile.general_idea: Add a target to build the frontend module.
Makefile.human_impl: build-frontend: cd frontend && yarn && yarn build

Makefile.general_idea: Add a target to start the frontend development server.
Makefile.human_impl: start-frontend: cd frontend && yarn run run

Makefile.general_idea: Add a target to build the Docker image for the frontend module.
Makefile.human_impl: docker-build-frontend: cd frontend && docker build -f docker/Dockerfile.multistage -t quay.io/quarkus/code-quarkus-frontend .

Makefile.general_idea: Add a target to start the application using Docker Compose.
Makefile.human_impl: compose: docker-compose up

Makefile.general_idea: Add a target to deploy the application to OpenShift.
Makefile.human_impl: deploy-openshift: cd openshift && ./deploy.sh;

Makefile.general_idea: Remove the debug target as it is no longer needed or handled differently.
Makefile.human_impl: Removed debug target

Makefile.general_idea: Remove the generic clean target, likely replaced by module-specific builds or IDE actions.
Makefile.human_impl: Removed clean target

Makefile.general_idea: Remove the native build target from the Makefile.
Makefile.human_impl: Removed native target

Makefile.general_idea: Remove the extension add target from the Makefile.
Makefile.human_impl: Removed ext-add target

Makefile.general_idea: Remove the extension list target from the Makefile.
Makefile.human_impl: Removed ext-list target

build_deploy.sh.general_idea: Replace the monolithic Docker build and push logic with a modular approach that delegates to sub-project build scripts.
build_deploy.sh.human_impl: Removed docker build/push commands and added calls to (cd frontend;./build_deploy.sh), (cd api;./build_deploy.sh), and (cd acceptance-test;./build_deploy.sh).

build_deploy.sh.general_idea: Add a check to skip the build process if the latest commit message indicates a dependency bump, likely to avoid redundant builds for automated updates.
